title: zanthoxylum paracanthum
intro: Zanthoxylum paracanthum, also known as the prickly pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum paracanthum include relief from pain and fever, as well as its potential to prevent or treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are valued for their ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system.
